positive: A stylized, geometric depiction of a majestic forest creature, perhaps a griffin or a mythical fox, integrated with abstract botanical elements. The creature should be centered, rendered in a bold, clean silhouette against a negative space background, filled with negative space and positive space principles. Use a color palette of deep sapphire blue, emerald green, and antique gold accents. The style should be neo-traditional illustrative tattoo art mixed with Art Nouveau symmetry. The composition must be highly scalable and look excellent when printed on fabric, featuring strong linework, high contrast, and repeating motif potential. Graphic design quality, suitable for merchandise.
negative: photorealistic, photograph, blurry, low detail, poorly drawn, artifacts, watermark, text, logo, signature, cropped, messy, noise, bad anatomy, extra limbs
